Origins._note: Origin S3 bucket is in us-east-1. Created in 2022 when the company was US-only and never migrated.

ViewerCertificate._note: ACM certificate ARN region is us-east-1. AWS REQUIRES that ACM certs used by CloudFront live in us-east-1, regardless of where the distribution serves traffic. This is a documented platform requirement.

Items._note: Lambda@Edge function. Lambda@Edge can only be CREATED and UPDATED in us-east-1; the runtime then replicates the function to all CloudFront edge locations. Existing replicas continue running during a us-east-1 outage; updates and rollbacks require us-east-1.

_observed_during_outage: Existing CloudFront edge cache hits served stale content for ~75 minutes (cache TTL). After cache expiration, viewer-request behavior continued to invoke the Lambda@Edge replica successfully (it was already deployed), but origin fetches returned 502 because the S3 origin in us-east-1 was unreachable.
